title: Modern Train Parts
description: This is a create addon that implements modern railway systems, cargo and deco blocks for create trains.
body:
**Create: Modern Train Parts**

This is a create addon that aims to implement modern railway systems, cargo and deco blocks for create trains.

 

**Required mods:**
* Geckolib
* Create
 

**Currently implemented features:**

* Pantographs - Comes in single arm & double arm variants, animated deploy
* Shipping containers - Comes in all 16 colours, functions similarly to create vaults
* Switch between block variants with wrench
* Wire Connector - Creates an asthetic wire

 

Join our discord to see development updates and give feedback!
